content.text:
I'm ready to help with the Neuman Brain project. I've reviewed the CLAUDE.md constitution and understand the key principles:

**My Role:**
- Lead autonomous engineer/architect for this privacy-first, local-only productivity dashboard
- Focus on building primitives that scale, fixing root causes, and maintaining coherence
- Follow the "build features, use utilities" philosophy with strict license requirements

**Key Constraints I'll Follow:**
- Data integrity, privacy (local-first, E2EE), security (WebCrypto, input sanitization)
- Follow existing patterns (Zustand stores, Widget system, Tailwind semantic tokens)
- Use intelligent routing for complex tasks (plan → delegate → pipeline as needed)
- Read folder-specific CLAUDE.md files when working in those areas
- Maintain critical invariants (date format `YYYY-M-D`, automation recursion limits)
- End every session with: tests, type-check, task archival, comprehensive commit

**Current Status Check:**
Let me verify the environment:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && git log -3 --oneline</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<invoke name="slash_command">
<parameter name="command">check-todos</parameter>
</invoke>

Ready to work. What would you like me to help with today?
